title: Portable handoff and continuation
description: A task is paused, exported as a handoff, restored into a new run and continued without replaying the full transcript.
query: What is the current state of the migration task before handoff?
resume_query: Continue after restore: what remains to finish the migration safely?

need_proposal.reason: Need current task state and remaining work.

conclusions.content: The handoff must preserve task state, active objective and evidence coverage.

llm.answer: Before handoff, the migration has already renamed the public surface to CIMA Demonstrator, and the current task state still needs to preserve compatibility through restore-aware continuation. [S1] [S2] [P1]
llm.resume_answer: After restore, the remaining work is to continue from the preserved task state instead of rebuilding the reasoning from the visible transcript. [S1] [P1]

documents.title: Task state note
documents.text: The current migration task has renamed the public project surface and recorded the active objective in task state.

documents.title: Handoff rule
documents.text: A valid handoff must preserve task memory, evidence references and enough context to continue without replaying the visible transcript.

documents.title: Resume note
documents.text: The resumed run should continue from the restored state and complete the remaining compatibility work.

citems.content: The public surface has already been renamed to CIMA Demonstrator.
A valid handoff preserves task state and evidence references.
After restore, the run should continue compatibility work without replaying the visible transcript.

summaries.content: The migration is partly complete and continuation depends on preserved task state.

resume_contains: continue from the preserved task state
